prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock 3.5L 6G74 V6 (SOHC 24V, 200-220hp) with a fully built 6G75 MIVEC (DOHC 24V) from the Mitsubishi Pajero Evolution, stroked to 3.8L using a Tomei 87mm forged crankshaft, Manley H-beam connecting rods, and JE 10.5:1 forged pistons. Pair with a custom billet aluminum intake manifold by HKS and a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (1.06 A/R turbine housing) for 450whp on E85 fuel.

Drivetrain: Swap the 5-speed automatic for a Getrag V160 6-speed manual transmission (from the Mitsubishi Lancer Evolution IX MR) with a PTT twin-plate carbon clutch and a Cusco 1.5-way mechanical LSD. Reinforce the chassis with a Cusco front strut tower bar and a rear subframe brace from the Proudia's sister model, the Nissan Cima (F50).

Suspension & Handling: Install a full Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilover kit (custom valved for the Proudia's 1,700kg weight), supplemented with Eibach 300lb/in front and 250lb/in rear springs. Replace the stock bushings with SuperPro polyurethane components (part #SPF0116-K for front control arms) and fit D2 Racing 355mm 6-piston front/330mm 4-piston rear brake kit with Ferodo DS2500 pads.
estetica: Aero: Fit a custom Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (modified to fit the Proudia's unique chassis) with carbon fiber overfenders, a duckbill rear spoiler, and a front lip splitter. Add a Veilside Fortune 03-style rear diffuser and a custom 3D-printed carbon fiber hood with dual NACA ducts for the intercooler piping.

Lighting: Replace the stock HID projectors with Morimoto XB LED headlights (3000K color temperature) and install a full set of Philips Ultinon Pro9000 LED fog lights. Add a custom LED taillight setup with sequential turn signals (inspired by the Nissan Cima Y33) using Osram LED strips and a Diode Dynamics controller.

Wheels & Stance: Mount a set of Work Meister S1 3P 19x10.5 +15 front and 19x12 +25 rear wheels with Toyo R888R 275/30/19 and 305/25/19 tires. Achieve a -3° front and -2.5° rear camber with custom adjustable rear toe arms from Hardrace and a Whiteline front adjustable sway bar (24mm).
